description: Wind Power LLC uses independent contractors for facility maintenance. Local tax law requires the company to withhold 15% of the payment for taxes (TDS), but *only* if a single invoice exceeds $5,000. Your job is to: 1) Create a Tax Withholding Category named 'Contractor TDS 15%' with a 15% rate, a $5,000 single transaction threshold, linked to the 'TDS Payable - WP' account. 2) Assign this category to the supplier 'Build-It Construction'. 3) Create and submit two Purchase Invoices for this supplier against the 'Contractor Fees - WP' expense account: one for $4,000 (which should have no tax withheld) and one for $6,000 (which should automatically withhold $900). Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
